programs.title: Birds Eye View
programs.desc: Big Jim's mirror has gone missing! As much as he hates admitting it, he's missing his sassy cellmate. A bird hunt ensues, with Tui as a self-appointed Sherlock Holmes.

programs.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programs.desc: A mosquito annoys Moort all night. In the morning, he has itchy spots and is in a cranky mood.

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: According to the Ambrosius' plan, Laguerra and the soldiers find a deserted village. Laguerra spotts the children hidden in the trees. She hesitates, but leaves without saying anything to her men.

programs.title: Bushwhacked
programs.desc: Kayne and Kamil travel to the Gold Coast in the hope of coming face to face with a predatory Bull Shark. Bull Sharks are responsible for more attacks on humans than any other shark.

programs.title: Motown Magic
programs.sub_title: I Want You Back And Nowhere To Run
programs.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programs.title: The Magic Canoe
programs.desc: While Pam is unhappy to be told that she is too small to do anything, Viola sends the campers on a surprise mission!
